productDisplayName: Murcia Women Leather Office Grey Bag
description: Compositions:Leather bag with wooden handle, chains and tassels.This elegant leather bag from murcia with a well crafted wooden handle and tassels is a great addition to your wardrobe. The simple design complemented by the stud detailing makes this a perfect bag for many occassions. Team it up with casuals or semi formals to make an elegant impression. The roomy interiors and pockets easily hold all your belongings when you go out.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
